visualizations.description: A force-directed network graph is chosen because the dataset is naturally relational (sponsor-to-drug edges with an associated weight), making a network view more informative than a bar chart for showing how sponsors connect to multiple drugs.
visualizations.title: Network of Sponsors and Drugs in Breast Cancer Trials

meta.original_query: Show a network of sponsors and drugs for breast cancer trials

input_interpretation.resolution: Query is primary; structured params confirm/add (supplement).

limitations: Requirement req1: analyzed 200 of 16627 matching studies (Reached max_studies cap or page limit).
